item.description:
What's New

  • add accessibility labels to status indicators and interactive elements
  • visual refresh across sidebar, list rows, detail pane, and empty state

Fixes

  • resolve force unwraps, stale state, and concurrent refresh issues
  • increase UI test timeouts to prevent flaky ASAN failures
  • surface fetch errors to user and skip UI tests locally
  • polish action bar and maintenance view layout

Documentation

  • update CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect current codebase
